mentions.note: AI accelerator technology compelling (15x faster than GPU for inference, $20B OpenAI deal), but IPO mania valuation at 187x sales vs. Nvidia 26x unjustifiable; wait for 50%+ pullback.

Botched IPO; opened at $370 vs $170-180 expected. Caller Angel and hundreds of thousands underwater on secondary purchases. Misallocation by underwriters. Cut position in half; if rallies more, get rid of rest. Cautionary tale for SpaceX risk.
